title: Xtra Crisp Vietnamese Shrimp Spring Rolls
description: A light and crisp Vietnamese dish featuring shrimp and cocoa, with a floral twist, low in sodium and perfect for a snack or appetizer
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat
Add the shrimp and cook until pink and fully cooked
In a large bowl, whisk together the cocoa powder and rice vinegar
Add the cooked shrimp to the bowl and toss to coat
Arrange a rice paper sheet on a flat surface and brush with water
Place a few shrimp, carrot, cucumber, and mint leaves in the center of the rice paper
Fold the bottom half of the rice paper up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the spring roll
Serve the spring rolls immediately, garnished with additional mint leaves if desired
